entry.title: anthonyrussano.github.io
entry.content:
Description

https://anthonyrussano.github.io is a static site hosted by GitHub pages.

The source code is privately held on a GitLab server.

The static html is generated locally in my Development Environment and then deployed to my public GithHub Repository.

Public Repo: https://github.com/anthonyrussano/anthonyrussano.github.io

Purpose

Publish code project related info.[1]

Sources

  1. github.com ↩︎

entry.title: cloudtraining.on.fleek.co
entry.content:
Description

https://cloudtraining.on.fleek.co is a static site hosted on IPFS using the Fleek.co platform.[1]

The source code is privately held on my GitLab server.

The static html is generated locally in my Development Environment and then directly uploaded to IPFS and deployed to fleek’s CDNs using the fleek cli-tool.

Purpose

To Quickly and easily publish educational articles related to Cloud Technologies.

Sources

  1. fleek.co ↩︎
